name: TECHKNOWMAD Cortex
description: Open-source AI agent tools for code quality, security, memory, orchestration, and development lifecycle automation. 18 skills spanning SAST scanning, code review, TDD enforcement, multi-agent orchestration, persistent memory, and GitHub automation.

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.description: Run bandit SAST, semgrep static analysis, and secret detection on code repositories. Returns severity-graded findings with CWE references.
examples: Scan this Python project for security vulnerabilities
Check for hardcoded secrets in the codebase
Run a full security audit on /path/to/repo

skills.name: Code Review Engine
skills.description: Multi-dimensional automated code review covering correctness, security, performance, maintainability, and style.
examples: Review this PR for bugs and security issues
What are the maintainability concerns in this module?

skills.name: De-Slop Scanner
skills.description: Detects AI-generated writing patterns. Scans for emoji abuse, hyperbolic language, buzzword stacking, and motivational filler. Returns a 0-100 slop score.
examples: Score this README for AI writing patterns
Clean up the AI-generated language in this document

skills.name: TDD Enforcer
skills.description: Validates test-driven development compliance. Checks that tests exist before implementation, enforces coverage thresholds, and detects testing anti-patterns.
examples: Check if this project meets 80% test coverage
Detect testing anti-patterns in the test suite

skills.name: Agent Orchestrator
skills.description: Multi-agent workflow coordination with dependency resolution, parallel execution, and fault-tolerant task routing.
examples: Run a security scan and code review in parallel, then publish
Orchestrate a 3-agent pipeline with dependencies

skills.name: Agent Output Validator
skills.description: Validates AI agent outputs against schema contracts, quality thresholds, and safety constraints.
examples: Validate this agent's JSON output against the contract
Check if the agent output passes safety constraints

skills.name: Context Engineer
skills.description: Builds optimal context windows for LLM interactions with compression, prioritization, and token budgeting.
examples: Build an 8K token context from these 5 documents
Compress this context to fit within the token limit

skills.name: Persistent Memory
skills.description: Key-value memory system for AI agents with TTL, tagging, and semantic search across sessions.
examples: Store this project context for future sessions
Search memory for anything related to deployment

skills.name: Session Memory
skills.description: Lightweight session-scoped checkpoints that persist across context window resets.
examples: Checkpoint the current working state
Restore from the last checkpoint

skills.name: GitHub MCP
skills.description: GitHub API integration via MCP for repository, file, branch, PR, issue, and release management.
examples: Push this file to the main branch
Create a PR from feature-branch to main

skills.name: Dev Lifecycle Engine
skills.description: Full software development lifecycle tracking from planning through production with phase gates.
examples: What phase is this project in?
Run the pre-deployment gate check

skills.name: Diff Generator
skills.description: Snapshot-based file system diffs with structured change reports.
examples: Show what changed since the last snapshot
Generate a diff report for this directory

skills.name: Repo Publisher
skills.description: Pre-publish pipeline chaining security, quality, structure validation, and metadata updates.
examples: Run the full pre-publish pipeline on this repo
Is this repo ready to publish?

skills.name: Meta Skill Evolver
skills.description: Analyzes and improves AI agent skills through metrics collection and iterative refinement.
examples: Analyze this skill's performance and suggest improvements
Evolve this skill based on usage metrics

skills.name: Skill Validator
skills.description: Validates skill structure, frontmatter, and scripts against canonical specification.
examples: Validate this skill directory structure
Does this SKILL.md meet the spec?

skills.name: Skill Test Harness
skills.description: Test framework for AI agent skills with structured test suites and coverage reporting.
examples: Run the test suite for this skill
What's the test coverage for this skill?

skills.name: Pre-Package Pipeline
skills.description: Pre-packaging validation for Claude Code skills ensuring .skill file readiness.
examples: Is this skill ready to package?
Run pre-packaging validation

skills.name: Design System Forge
skills.description: Generates complete design systems from brand parameters with accessibility compliance.
examples: Generate a design system from these brand colors
Create accessible component specs for buttons and forms
